usage: setPinConstraint [-help] {[-global | -cell <cell_name> | -matchEarlyGlobalRoute ] [-global | -pin <pin_name_list> | -area {x1 y1 x2 y2} | -side <side_names> | -matchEarlyGlobalRoute ] [-global | -layer {layer_id_or_name_list} | -loc {<x> <y> <z>}] [-global | -loc {<x> <y> <z>} | -edge <edge_numbers> | -corner <corner_number>] [[-pin <pin_name_list> [-loc {<x> <y> <z>}] [-edge <edge_numbers>]] | [ [-loc {<x> <y> <z>}] [-edge <edge_numbers>]] | [-corner_to_pin_distance <pin_distance> [-corner <corner_number>]]] [{-pin <pin_name_list> | -pinTemplate {layer_id_or_name_list}} [-use_min_width_as_depth | -depth <depth>] [-width <width>]] [[-layer {layer_id_or_name_list} [-side <side_names>]] | [-pinTemplate {layer_id_or_name_list} [-use_min_width_as_depth ]]] [-spacing <spacing> [-area {x1 y1 x2 y2}] [-side <side_names>]]} [-depth <depth> [-special_wire ]]

options.name: -area
options.description: Specifies an area overlapping with partition where spacing constraint applied.

options.name: -cell
options.description: Specifies the name of the cell, wildcard can be specified. The cell name is not required if the command is run on a top-level cell.

options.name: -corner
options.description: Specifies the corner of the partition block.

options.name: -corner_to_pin_distance
options.description: Specifies the corner to pin distance in tracks.

options.name: -depth
options.description: Specifies the pin depth in microns.

options.name: -edge
options.description: Specifies the integer value where edge numbering starts from lower-left corner of a partition clock-wise.

options.name: -layer
options.description: Specifies the metal layers for the partition pin.

options.name: -loc
options.description: Specifies the x and y locations and z layer number of the partition pin.

options.name: -matchEarlyGlobalRoute
options.description: Specifies to change pin constraints for co-relation with flat earlyGlobalRoute.

options.name: -pin
options.description: Specifies the name of the partition pin. You can use wildcards with this parameter.

options.name: -pinTemplate
options.description: Specifies the metal layers for the width, depth and spacing constraints at global level and cell level.

options.name: -side
options.description: Specifies name of the sides. Valid values are { N S E W } or { L B T R } or all

options.name: -spacing
options.description: Specifies the minimum spacing between pins in pin pitch value.

options.name: -special_wire
options.description: Specifies the depth constraint to be set and honored by the partition command only for special wire pins

options.name: -use_min_width_as_depth
options.description: Minimum width should be used as the pin depth

options.name: -width
options.description: Specifies the pin width in microns.
